text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey... Hey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A familiar voice pulls me back to consciousness.
As I open my eyes, I slowly adjust to the blinding
light and see...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Someone's finally awake, huh? I was waiting so
long that I can perfectly peel off tape without
ripping it now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Gold Ship, who appears to be wearing a
swimsuit. Why are we in this tranquil field,
though? I frantically try to clear my blurry mind
and remember how we got here...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And this is Cursor Scroll! Wooo! ☆ Now,
Watermelon Slaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How do ya like my new summertime dance
moves?! Deserves a hundred-page report on how
inspired you are, I'd say!
choice_data_list: Yeah, um... very nice!
Yeah, um... very nice!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come again? This isn't some boring
vacuum-sealed pack of tea leaves! I really
expected more from you...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Look, that ant's making a food delivery all
the way out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when everything went dark, and the next
thing I know, I wake up here.
choice_data_list:
(I'm even more confused than when I didn't
remember anything!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I gave the details of the operation using the
learn-while-sleeping method. You're clear on our
mission, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're taking it down today! The giant squid spirit
that's holed up here may have once ruled the
ancient seas, but its time is over!
choice_data_list: What? Wh-why?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's up with you? Is your AI from last century
or something? It's like you don't understand one
darn thing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
See these creatures on me? The seaweed, scallop,
crab, starfish, and pearl? Look how brave they
are!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
These famous sages of the sea have graced my
racewear with their awesome power! It's
spectacular!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Even now they whisper to me. The world can't be
saved with ocean power alone. We need to fill
ourselves with land power too and hit the squid in
its lair.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then we follow their strategy to blast it with a
beam of concentrated sunlight and turn it into
dried squid! Doesn't that get you pumped?!
choice_data_list: Uh, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's it gonna be? You going home, or do you
wanna come with me and live forever?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Join me and they'll carve our valiant figures into a
stone monument—and sell key chains of us in
souvenir shops across the country! Amazing,
right?!
choice_data_list: ...Y-yeah! I wanna be a legend!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, now we're talking! You shoulda been
honest with me from the get-go, you little rebel!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, pick up that plankton blade. But take it
easy... We're already in the heart of the giant
squid's lair.
choice_data_list: The squid is here?!
The squid is here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel any presence, but apparently it's here.
I take up my plankton blade (stick) and wait for
the signal from Gold Ship...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Raaaagh! Banish the evil spirit! Holy Water
Ruuuush!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship unleashes a barrage of fire from her
water gun as I start swinging wildly until I can't
tell left from right anymore. And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the sky goes dark and the ground
begins to quake. In the distance, birds flee across
the sky and herds of deer bound toward the
forest... What's happening?!
choice_data_list: Th-this doesn't look good!
Th-this doesn't look good!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That tentacled menace... This just got serious.
The squid's about to use its super move!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Crap, this is bad. If we don't charge up the pearl
with sun power, we can't finish it off with an
ultimate Glassun Beam blast!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There must be some light around somewhere!
Please, light... come to meeee!
choice_data_list: Oh! How about the flashlight on my phone?
Oh! How about the flashlight on my phone?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Shine it on the pearl, quick!
Yeeeah! I can feel the poweeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I come to my senses, calm has returned to
the area. We must have defeated the giant squid!
choice_data_list: Was that the power of the pearl?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We burned it right in the eyeballs! This
pearl, you see, went on a pilgrimage around the
world to become a holy oyster and save all
sentient life!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And we did it without using sunlight! You came up
with an amazing idea!
choice_data_list: It was all thanks to the sea creatures' strategy.
It was all thanks to the sea creatures' strategy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hah! You really know what's up! Praise them like
they deserve! Go on!
choice_data_list: Praise be to the sea creatures!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Haha! My racewear holds the all-stars of the
seven seas!
choice_data_list:
It's incredible the phone light had that kind of
power...
I think your racewear got powered up.
I think your racewear got powered up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Haha! My racewear holds the all-stars of the
seven seas!
choice_data_list:
It's incredible the phone light had that kind of
power...
I think your racewear got powered up.
I think your racewear got powered up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh, well, the power of the real thing would've
knocked your socks off! A sunbeam would've shot
straight back to the sun itself!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, you don't even gotta say it! I bet you're
dying to have a suit of your own, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No prob, 'cause I'm having a giveaway sale! I'll
put an order in next time I stick my face in the
ocean! You're gonna love it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the future is set. Soon I'll be walking onto
the track with Gold Ship, sporting the same
outfit... What have I done?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Obviously! You're now looking at an amphibious
superalloy super suit!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, we may have defeated the giant squid,
but there's one last power to charge up. After sea
and land comes...
choice_data_list: ...Air?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bingo! You nailed it! I'll draw up a plan soon,
cool? It's gonna blow you away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open my eyes to find we're in the air... I figured
this would happen, but I was too caught up in the
moment to do anything but agree.
